title: Holographic reconstruction from entanglement entropy, Wilson loops, and geodesic constraints
bridge_note: EE alone leaves bulk reconstruction underdetermined; Wilson loops add missing timelike information, and combined probes move reconstruction toward identifiability.
cosine_bridge: EE ⊕ WL ⊕ GEO form a constraint ensemble: single probes leave degeneracy, independent probes phase-lock reconstruction into an identifiable branch (45° 📐).
engagement_detail: Tweet + Grok framing mapped EE ⊕ WL ⊕ GEO to constraint ensemble and phase-lock reconstruction (45° gate).
notes_internal: Direct correspondence to btz-phase-lock repo: EE-only underdetermined; EE⊕WL resolves; EE⊕WL⊕GEO yields unique reconstruction (orthogonality threshold).
